ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $510.00

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT LI-JUEN HWANG'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING, EVIDENTIARY, ISSUE PRECLUSION AND MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF 510.00 AS AGAINST PLAINTIFF - THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED. PLAINTIFF MARVIN RAMIREZ HAS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER DATED SEPTEMBER 28, 2015 TO SERVE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION AND TO PAY SANCTIONS. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF MARVIN RAMIREZ'S COMPLAINT IN THIS ACTION IS HEREBY STRICKEN AND THE CASE IS DISMISSED IN ITS ENTIRETY. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED IN THE INTERESTS OF JUSTICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM; JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT LI-JUEN HWANG'S MOTION TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITED - THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY, THE TRUTH OF EACH MATTER SPECIFIED IN THE DEFENDANT LI-JUEN HWANG'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, SET ONE, IS HEREBY DEEMED ADMITTED. IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF MARVIN RAMIREZ SHALL PAY SANCTIONS OF $510, REPRESENTING REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS INCURRED FOR MAKING THIS MOTION, TO STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER, COUNSEL TO DEFENDANT LI-JUEN HWANG, ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 24, 2016. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM; JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion Adn Motion To Have Requests For Admissions Deemed Admited
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SABRINA BERDUX OF THE STRATMAN PATTERSON & HUNTER, TEL. NO. 1-510-457-3444 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LI-JUEN HWANG's Motion To Have Requests For Admissions Deemed Admited - The motion is unopposed. Accordingly, the truth of each matter specified in the Defendant Li-Juen Hwang's Request for Admissions, Set One, is hereby deemed admitted. In addition, Plaintiff Marvin Ramirez shall pay sanctions of $510, representing reasonable attorneys' fees and costs incurred for making this motion, to Stratman, Patterson & Hunter, counsel to defendant Li-Juen Hwang, on or before February 24, 2016. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro tem; James Fleming; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating, Evidentiary, Issue Preclusion And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of 510.00 As Against Plaintiff
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. SABRINA BERDUX OF THE STRATMAN PATTERSON & HUNTER, TEL. NO. 1-510-457-3444 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LI-JUEN HWANG's Motion For Terminating, Evidentiary, Issue Preclusion And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of 510.00 As Against Plaintiff - The motion is unopposed. Plaintiff Marvin Ramirez has failed to comply with the Court's Order dated September 28, 2015 to serve responses without objection to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production and to pay sanctions. Accordingly, Plaintiff Marvin Ramirez's Complaint in this action is hereby stricken and the case is dismissed in its entirety. Monetary sanctions are denied in the interests of justice. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro tem; James Fleming; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Counsel for the Defendant stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. DEFENDANT LI-JUEN HWANG'S Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents is granted. The moving is to prepare a form of order.
